about Positivia

Great pieces, Right Places

The Positivia Consult is committed to transforming the recruitment landscape by employing a diverse array of innovative hiring strategies to connect businesses with top-tier talent. We leverage data-driven insights, targeted outreach, and advanced recruitment methodologies to discover the best job vacancies and match them with highly qualified candidates.

what we serve

Tailoring Talent for Excellence

Recruitment

We excel at connecting businesses with exceptional talent through our comprehensive Recruitment services. Our recruitment process is thorough and tailored to meet your specific needs, understanding that the foundation of a successful organization lies in its people, we are committed to helping you find the perfect candidates who not only possess the right skills but also align with your company’s culture and values. 

Background Checks

Our background check process is thorough and discreet, covering a wide range of areas to give you a complete picture of each candidate. This includes verifying the candidate’s identity to prevent identity theft and fraud, checking for any criminal records to ensure the safety and security of your workplace, and confirming previous employment history to validate the candidate’s experience and job performance. We also ensure that the candidate’s educational qualifications are accurate and legitimate, review their financial responsibility, which is particularly important for positions involving financial management or sensitive information, and contact professional and personal references to gain insights into the candidate’s character and work ethic.

CV Re-write

Our CV Re-Write services are designed to transform your existing resume into a powerful marketing tool that highlights your skills, achievements, and experiences in the best possible light. Additionally, we provide guidance on how to present your experience and skills in a way that demonstrates your value to potential employers. Whether you are a recent graduate, mid-career professional, or senior executive, our CV Re-Write services are tailored to your unique needs and designed to help you stand out in a competitive job market. 

Advert Posting

Our expertise ensures that your advertisements attract top-tier talent and resonate with the right candidates, effectively promoting your brand as an employer of choice. Our Advert Posting services are designed to streamline your recruitment process, saving you time and resources while ensuring that you attract the best talent for your organization.

Golden opportunities

Job adverts directly to your phone

You can have secure and verified job postings delivered to your inbox, as well as a dedicated Whatsapp and Telegram group, to make things easier for you.

Join WhatsApp
Join Telegram
